default_escalation_rule.issue: Issue not strictly defined in matrix
required_actions: Do not automate solve. Route to supervisor/VIPRES human review with full ticket context.
compliance_checks: System must not invent a process when the matrix does not define the issue.

rules.key: Ticket | Reservation not found at check-in
rules.issue: Reservation not found at check-in
rules.issue_normalized: reservation not found at check in
required_actions: Call Supplier, 2. If unconfirmed by the Supplier in 20 minutes, 3. Create a Voucher and Rebook (if current hotel has inventory) or Relocate by Booking at a near by hotel. ** Do your best to upgrade the client's room type  to use full voucher value for their new reservation** The exception would be in they are lowering the number of nights they will expect a refund of the unused night(s). If there are any unused funds; Process a refund via the queue for the client and advise of the refund timeline (2-7 business days).

Call the hotel and obtain FOC, note the booking accurately with the hotel staff member's name, (if possible) the cancellation number, and the email address for the hotel manager or front desk. If you do not obtain FOC, take down hotel staff member's name and email address for the property.

If the guest declines support and requests a refund; then call the hotel and obtain FOC, note the booking accurately with the hotel staff member's name, (if possible) the cancellation number, and the email address for the hotel manager or front desk. If you do not obtain FOC, take down hotel staff member's name and email address for the property.
Process a refund via the queue for the client and advise of the refund timeline (2-7 business days).

rules.key: Ticket | Incorrect guest name or modifying name
rules.issue: Incorrect guest name or modifying name
rules.issue_normalized: incorrect guest name or modifying name
required_actions: If Name: Call the hotel and ask them to "add" the name (not to change the name), 2. If the hotel refuses then call the supplier and ask them to change it.
If the supplier is unable please go back to the phone and let the guest know you will rebook them under the correct name.

rules.key: Ticket | Incorrect  dates or modifying dates
rules.issue: Incorrect  dates or modifying dates
rules.issue_normalized: incorrect dates or modifying dates
required_actions: If the issue is the dates: (Prepaid) 1. Create a voucher via the refund queue and rebook the guest for the correct dates. ** Do your best to upgrade the client's room type to use full voucher value for their new reservation** The exception would be in the client is lowering the number of nights the client will expect a refund of the unused night(s). If there are any unused funds; Process a refund via the queue for the client and advise of the refund timeline (2-7 business days).
After the guest has their new reservation and confirmation let them go and place yourself on DND.

Call the hotel and obtain FOC, note the booking accurately with the hotel staff member 's name, (if possible) the cancellation number, and the email address for the hotel manager or front desk. If you do not obtain FOC, take down hotel staff member's name and email address for the property.

If the guest declines support and requests a refund; then call the hotel and obtain FOC, note the booking accurately with the hotel staff member 's name, (if possible) the cancellation number, and the email address for the hotel manager or front desk. If you do not obtain FOC, take down hotel staff member's name and email address for the property.

Process a refund via the queue for the client and advise of the refund timeline (2-7 business days).  (Pay at Hotel) 1. Call the hotel, ask for the dates to be changed, if the hotel agrees note the request accurately with the hotel staff member's name, (if possible) the confirmation number, and the email of the front desk.
Let the guest know their requested change is completed.

If the hotel declines the modification, check the website to confirm we have availability, advise the guest that you will need to request cancellation to rebook them, go back to the hotel, obtain FOC from the hotel, note the booking accurately with the hotel staff member's name, (if possible) the cancellation number, and the email address for the hotel manager or front desk. If you do not obtain FOC, take down hotel staff member's name and email address for the property.
Rebook the client for their perferred hotel or near by hotel if inventory is not available.
Complete the reservation, confirm the guest has received their confirmation and note the orginial booking with the new itinerary.

rules.key: Ticket | Cancelling Non Refundable
rules.issue: Cancelling Non Refundable
rules.issue_normalized: cancelling non refundable
required_actions: If a guest is requesting to cancel a non refundable room type (reasons why we would process are agent error, hotel closure or unable to accept the guest, unpredictable or dangerous weather conditions, death, flight cancellations, medical, emergencies, gesture of goodwill due to the hotel's exception).

Check to see if the reservation has RPP, if yes offer to email the claim link to the client or the guest can receive 100% voucher immediately. If the guest denies the voucher please reach out to the hotel to see if we can obtain a waiver.

Call the hotel and request FOC, note the booking accurately with the hotel staff member's name, (if possible) the cancellation number, and the email address for the hotel manager or front desk. If you do not obtain FOC, take down hotel staff member's name and email address for the property. If you are unable to obtain FOC, ask the hotel for a waiver minus one night (for multi nights), if it's still denied then we can offer the guest the option to add a name so a friend or family member can use the room. If none of these options are acceptable we would offer 100% voucher or 50% refund. Make sure the guest is aware the hotel is denying the refund in case they would like to contact the hotel directly for a full waiver. If you do obtain FOC then note the request accurately and completely. Then process a refund via the Refund Queue for the amount you were able to get waived. Advise the guest of the refund timeline (2-7 business days). Do not refund the RPP.

If you do not obtain FOC, take down hotel staff member's name and email address for the property.
Process a refund via the queue for the client of the unused nights and advise of the refund timeline (2-7 business days).

notes.topic: When requesting FOC or Partial Unused Rooms
notes.note: You may not always get FOC so if the hotel denies FOC then ask for FOC minus first night penalty on multiple night reservations. | ** it's the hotel's industry standards to charge one night penalty on reservations
We will not be removing this when we are processing refunds | ** refunding RPP only when the guest asks for it to be removed

Agents will have 72 hours to resolve an issue, if left unresolved in 72 hours the ticket will be transferred to a view for it to be reviewed and solved in house. | ** key for this step is in avoiding disputes

notes.topic: If a guest declines service support and uses their own card to rebook themselves
notes.note: Please have them email their receipt to Reservations@HotelPlanner.com to determine if reimbursement is available
We will always offer to rebook the guest | **never leave them without the support they are needing.
Instructions | Slack | Refund Queue | Create a Ticket | Supervisor

notes.topic: If the originial booking was made by a voucher
notes.note: If the booking is made with a voucher: Follow the same instructions for the escalation reason but you will need to ask the channel manager for a voucher to rebook with a new voucher or refund. | YES | NO | IF VOUCHER REQUEST IS UNANSWERED IN 15 MINUTES | YES
If the email on the reservation is incorrect, the customer will receive a text message with the voucher details. please  make sure to make the new reservation with the correct email address
